raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3, proposes concrete fixes, and flags framing creep at the end that undermines the stated contribution.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the 41% cost reduction claim), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift (the discussion of difficulty estimation in the closing paragraph).",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., the contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3) and proposes fixes.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides some annotations with source and reason, but not for every non-cosmetic change."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies a load-bearing internal contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3, proposes concrete fixes, and flags framing creep at the end that undermines the stated contribution.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., the 41% cost reduction claim), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope with one drift (the discussion of difficulty estimation in the closing paragraph).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text (e.g., the contradiction between Section 3.1 and Section 3.3) and proposes fixes.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides some annotations with source and reason, but not for every non-cosmetic change.
